name: FitAssessmentScorecards
description: Weighted fit-assessment scorecard tied to an Application. siteId is denormalized from the application's selectedSiteId so scorecards are site-scoped with the same server-side filter pattern as Applications. Criterion scores are 1-5; weightedTotal is the 0-100 rollup (Market 25, Technology 25, Team 20, Traction 20, ProgramFit 10). aiGenerated marks rows pre-populated by the EvaluateApplication AI action (human reviews + edits before saving). Internal staff-only.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: siteId
columns.description: Site (denormalized from the application's selectedSiteId) for site-scoping

columns.name: reviewerName
columns.description: Name of the reviewer who scored

columns.name: aiGenerated
columns.description: True when the scorecard was pre-populated by EvaluateApplication AI
